description: Baseline fresh-eye audit setup: added regression coverage for merge verify default and canonical feature naming, plus a new failing audit for the misleading 'set it as active' feature-tool claim. The initial harness exposes the intended metric but still exits nonzero when audits fail, so the next iteration should normalize the benchmark script to report audit_failures without treating the baseline as a crash.

Fixed the misleading feature-create contract by removing the 'set it as active' claim from FeatureTools metadata, and normalized autoresearch.sh so failing audits are reported via audit_failures instead of crashing the benchmark harness. The focused audit suite now passes cleanly and full lint/test checks stay green.

name: Fresh-eyes bug hunt across opencode-warcraft (doctor resilience audit)

description: Expanded the audit workload with a new DoctorTools resilience check for worktree-inspection failures. The issue is real, but placing the failing regression inside the main *.test.ts suite caused the global correctness checks to fail before the implementation existed. Discarding this shape and reintroducing the audit in a benchmark-only harness will keep the repository green while still driving the bug fix.

name: Fresh-eyes bug hunt across opencode-warcraft (doctor resilience eval)

description: Re-scoped the fresh-eye workload to a benchmark-only DoctorTools resilience eval outside the package test suites. The new audit exposes a real bug: doctorTool crashes instead of degrading gracefully when worktree inspection fails for a feature, while full lint and package tests remain green.

Made DoctorTools fail-soft around per-feature worktree inspection by catching listAll errors and surfacing them as a stale_worktrees warning instead of crashing the diagnostic tool. Added permanent regression coverage in doctor-tool.test.ts and kept the benchmark-only eval to ensure the degraded path stays green while full lint/test checks continue to pass.

Extended DoctorTools fail-soft behavior to feature enumeration as well as worktree inspection. The diagnostic tool now converts feature inventory crashes into a top-level feature_inventory warning instead of aborting, with permanent package coverage and benchmark eval coverage for both degraded paths.

name: Fresh-eyes bug hunt across opencode-warcraft (context status resilience eval)

description: Expanded the fresh-eye audit scope to ContextTools resilience and fixed warcraft_status so worktree inventory failures degrade to a worktreeHygiene warning instead of crashing status rendering. Added permanent package coverage plus a benchmark-only eval for the degraded path, with lint and full tests still passing.

name: Fresh-eyes bug hunt across opencode-warcraft (context workspace resilience eval)
